series_metadata.series_description: Contains all information associated with enrollment and management of a Confidential Informant (IC) or Underage Purchaser (UP). Series contains: INV 0048 Underage Purchaser Enrollment Information; INV 0061 Underage Purchaser Study Guide & Written Exam; INV 0089 Electronic Surveillance Release; INV 0161 Minor’s Medical Treatment Authorization; copy of UP birth certificate, copy of UP work permit (if applicable); any audits of the UP file; INV 0043 Underage Purchaser Payment Receipt; and all INV 0029 Confidential Informant Payment Logs.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for five years from the last time the UP was used, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for five years from the last time the UP was used, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
